verses.text: Tua ciangin Pasian hong kiko a, “Hih khuapi a susia ding no mihingte hong pai un la, na hiam zat ciat ding uh zong hong keng un,” ci-in a sam hi

Leilu lam biakinn kongpi pualam panin thakhatin mihing guk hong pai-in hiam khat ciat hong tawi uh hi. Saihadial puan a silh, lai gelhna ding a tawi mi khat tawh zong hong paikhawm uh hi. A vekpi-un sumngo biakna tau gei-ah hong ding uh hi
Tua ciangin ama omnasa kherub-te' tung panin Israel-te' Pasian' minthan'na vang hong pai-in biakinn kongah hong om hi. Tua ciangin amah in saihadial puan a silh, lai gelhna ding a tawipa samin
“Jerusalem khuasung khempeuhah pai kawikawi in la, hih khuapi sungah a muhdahhuai gamtatnate a kisepna hangin dahin a lungkham mi khempeuhte' taltangah ciamtehna va bawl in,” ci-in a sawl hi
Tua ciangin Pasian in a midangte kiangah, “Khuasung khempeuhah amah va zui un la, mi va that un. Kuamah hin'khawi kei un la, kuamah khasiat kei un

Puteek, nungak, tangval, numei, naupang dong takin va thatlum un la, ahi zongin a taltangah ciamtehna a nei peuhmah su kei un. Hih ka biakinn mahmah panin kipan pah un,” a cihna ka za hi. Tua ahih manin tua biakinn sungah a ding Israel makaite, kipatna-in a nei pah uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute kiangah, “Biakinn ninsak un. A tualtengah misi luanghawm dimsak un. Tu-in kipan un,” ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute kuankhia-in khuasungah mi thah ding a kipan uh hi

Tua bangin mi a kithah laitakin keimah guak ka om hi. Kei zong lei-ah bokin, “Topa Pasian aw, Jerusalem tungah na hehna hangin Israel mi a omlaisun khempeuh that mangkhin ding na hi hiam?” ci-in ka kiko hi

Tua ciangin amah in hong dawng a, “Israel mite leh Judah mite' mawhna nak liat mahmah hi. Gamsung khempeuh mi thahna tawh kidimsak uh a, Jerusalem khuapi, siatna namkim tawh kidimsak uh hi. Amaute in, ‘ Topa in i gam susia khin a, Topa in eite hong mulo hi,’ ci uh hi
Tua ahih manin amaute ka zah kei ding a, kuamah ka khasiat kei ding hi. Amaute' gamtatna, amaute' tung mah ka tusak ding hi,” hong ci hi
Tua ciangin saihadial puan silhin lai gelhna a tawi mipa in Topa ' kiangah thu hong zasak kik a, “Nong sawl bangin ka sem khinzo hi,” hong ci hi.
